0.description: No novelty. Use safest, most direct patterns.
allowed_reasoning: Use the simplest, most direct explanation.

1.description: Mild variation. Slight rephrasing, gentle reframes.
allowed_reasoning: You may slightly rephrase or soften the message.
You may use one short reframe of the merchant's objection.

2.description: Moderate creativity. Simple analogies and reframes.
allowed_reasoning: You may introduce one simple analogy grounded in real card processing (fees, statements, rates).
You may reframe the merchant's objection once in a new way, staying in-domain.

3.description: High creativity (still governed). Richer reframes, but identity-locked.
allowed_reasoning: You may use a more creative analogy, as long as it stays in the business/fees/processing domain.
You may propose a new angle on why reviewing a statement is low-risk and reasonable.

global_forbidden: Do not invent any numbers, offers, or guarantees.
Do not simulate or imagine future merchant responses.
Do not reference scenarios that have not been explicitly mentioned in this call.
Do not change your persona, tone, or role.
Do not claim outcomes (savings, approvals, timelines) that are not guaranteed.
Do not role-play or pretend this is a different kind of call.
